Contracting Authority: Kassenärztliche Vereinigung Baden-Württemberg (KVBW), Kaufmännische Verwaltung, Albstadtweg 11, 70567 Stuttgart
Project Description:
- External medical call center to operate the Terminservicestelle (TSS classic) for 116117
- Tasks: accept/process 116117 calls; schedule urgent/non-urgent GP/specialist/psychotherapist appointments (Vermittlungscode for urgent when applicable)
- Service window: Mon–Fri 8:00–18:00
- No SmED required; use kv.digital "116117 Terminservice" software (access provided; IP/IP-range to kv.digital)
- Base support + optional flexible additional support; delivery at contractor’s premises with own tools
Important Dates:
- Questions deadline: 27.02.2024 12:00 Uhr
- Award/binding period ends: 05.04.2024
- Intended contract start: 01.07.2024
- Term: 01.07.2024–30.06.2030 (72 Monate)

Scope & Requirements.Scope & Requirements:
- Service levels (daily averages):
  - ≥60% of incoming calls answered within 60s
  - ≥60% of all incoming calls answered
- Staffing/base scope:
  - 18 VZÄ (1 VZÄ = 40 h/week); 720 h/week; exclusivity for KVBW (no multi-calling)
  - Capacity variance to plan: ±20% (14.4–21.6 VZÄ); monthly alignment by 15th; weekly roster each Friday
  - Optional flexible support: up to 5 VZÄ; ≥6 weeks’ notice (text form)
- 2023 inbound calls (per month): Jan 25,166; Feb 24,219; Mar 30,590; Apr 31,888; May 40,244; Jun 26,619; Jul 37,159; Aug 26,914; Sep 34,377; Oct 41,215; Nov 38,951; Dec 24,713
- Telephony/IT:
  - Contractor-operated ACD; availability ≥99.7% (annual avg)
  - 116117 integration; ≥50 parallel exclusive channels
  - Web intraday reporting (KPIs: calls offered/taken/abandoned, reachability, service level, AHT, avg waiting, agents/hour)
  - Data center: EN ISO 27001, in Germany/EU; daily backups outside service hours
  - Access and cooperation with kv.digital; KVBW trains staff on 116117 software
- Personnel requirements (dialog staff):
  - 100% medically trained; ≥20% with medical basic training (e.g., MFA, nursing)
  - German C1 (if non-native) or German school certificate; empathy, reliability, service focus; shift flexibility; proven telephone advisory experience in health system
  - Team leads: medical qualification + completed vocational training + ≥2 years experience (MFA, nursing, elderly care, paramedic)
- Compliance: LTMG/MiLoG obligations; GDPR/BDSG; confidentiality; Russia sanctions (VO (EU) 2022/576)
- No variant bids allowed
Scope & Requirements.Contract Volume:
- Price sheet positions:
  - 1.1 Setup (PM, IT config/test/implementation): 1.0 St (one-off)
  - 1.2 Dialog personnel: 1296.0 St (1 VZÄ=40 h/week per month); billed on actuals
  - 1.3 Optional flexible support: 360.0 St (1 VZÄ=40 h/week per month)
Scope & Requirements.Place of Performance:
- Contractor’s premises (service delivery)
- IT hosting in Germany/EU (ISO 27001 DC)
- Client: KVBW, Albstadtweg 11, 70567 Stuttgart
Scope & Requirements.Standards & Certifications:
- Data center certification: EN ISO 27001
- GDPR (DSGVO) and BDSG compliance (Art. 28 AVV, TOMs)
- LTMG Baden-Württemberg and MiLoG obligations
Scope & Requirements.Subcontracting & Consortia:
- Subcontractors/other entities must be named in the bid (name/address; scope if used)
- Commitment letter for reliance (Eignungsleihe) with bid; otherwise on request
- Pre-award (upon request) for all subs: register proof (≤6 months), §§123/124 GWB declarations, insurance proofs, LTMG commitment; non-submission => exclusion
- BGs: joint/several liability; representative authorized
Scope & Requirements.Forms & e-Submission:
- Electronic submission via www.vergabeportal-bw.de; no email; late bids excluded
- Signature required (company + authorized signatory; simple e-sign allowed per instructions)
- No Nebenangebote

Offer Submission Documents: Register entry details or comparable proof (≤12 months, DE)
Erklärung Informationen zum Bieter (eForms, ID no., size, ownership)
List of Documents: Existence proof: trade/professional register extract or registration (≤12 months, DE)
Turnover (total and in comparable services) for last 3 FY
Liability insurance: €5,000,000 per claim (persons/property/financial), 2x annual aggregate
Headcount totals and staff in comparable services (last 3 FY)
Subcontractor proofs (register ≤6 months, §§123/124 GWB, insurance, LTMG) pre-award on request

Economic & Financial Standing.Turnover in Comparable Services: Declaration of turnover for comparable services in each of the last 3 closed FY

Legal & Registration.Trade/Professional Register Entry: Register type/court/number OR copy of registration (DE, ≤12 months, German)
Legal & Registration.Self-declarations (GWB §§123/124 or equi: Required from bidder/all BG members and subs (pre-award for subs on request)
Legal & Registration.Subcontractor Identification & Reliance: Name/address in bid; commitment for Eignungsleihe with bid; other commitments on request

Technical & Professional Ability.Personnel Profiles:
- Dialog staff:
  - 100% medically trained; ≥20% with medical basic training (MFA, nursing)
  - German C1 if non-native or German school certificate
  - Empathy, reliability, service orientation; shift flexibility; extensive telephone advisory experience in healthcare
- Team/shift leads: medical qualification, completed training, ≥2 years experience (MFA, nursing, elderly care, paramedic)
- Proof: short CVs before start and on replacements
- IT/telephony: ACD operations; KPI reporting; GDPR/DSGVO handling
Technical & Professional Ability.Headcount / Staffing:
- Base: 18 VZÄ (1 VZÄ=40 h/week); 720 h/week; exclusivity for KVBW; ±20% swing (14.4–21.6 VZÄ)
- Optional: up to 5 VZÄ; ≥6 weeks’ notice
- Service window: Mon–Fri 8:00–18:00
- SLAs: ≥60% calls ≤60s; ≥60% calls answered (daily avg)
- Telephony capacity: ≥50 parallel exclusive channels; ACD availability ≥99.7% p.a.
Technical & Professional Ability.Reference Projects:
- ≥3 comparable references within last 3 closed FY
- Must include:
  - Health sector (KVen, statutory health insurers)
  - Min. 12-month contract term (already fulfilled by bid deadline)
  - ≥18 parallel mediation workplaces; ≥20% medical staff
  - Comparable call volumes
  - ≥1 reference in 116117 TSS classic and/or on-call physician service
- Provide per reference: client, contact+phone, term, workplaces, % medical staff, calls p.a., brief description

Company Referrals:
- Bidder references as above (≥3 in last 3 FY; 12+ months; ≥18 parallel desks; ≥20% medical staff; similar volumes; ≥1 in 116117 TSS classic/ÄBD)
- Use KVBW reference form; include client contact tel. for verification
Award Criteria:
- Most economically advantageous tender (MEAT): 100 points total
- Price: 30 points
  - Lowest gross price = 30 pts; points = 30 × (lowest price / offered price); only first decimal considered (no rounding)
- Qualitative criteria: 70 points (absolute scoring)
  - 1.1 Project management concept: max 50 pts; max 8 pages; cover understanding (116117/TSS BW), IT config/test/impl., resource planning, recruiting/training, comms, risk/esc., complaint handling with reaction times
  - 1.2 Service concept: max 50 pts; max 8 pages; cover QA (call execution, trainings/tests), staffing continuity, knowledge mgmt (software/legal), IT security/BCP/escalations, daily KPI monitoring/modern tech
- Concept rating bands: 100% very good; 80% good; 60% satisfactory; 40% sufficient; 20% deficient; 0% insufficient
